records.name: Morrow Array
records.summary: A medical megacorp that buys loyalty through subsidized implants and enforces contracts with private trauma teams.

records.name: Saint Voltage
records.summary: A street church turned mutual-aid hacker collective that patches bodies and networks for anyone the city writes off.

records.name: Blue Ember Logistics
records.summary: A freight and drone-haul giant whose union-busting algorithms predict labor unrest before workers organize.

details.goal: frictionless movement of goods and data

records.name: The Silt Knives
records.summary: An amphibious smuggling gang that controls flood tunnels, storm drains, and black-market river routes.

records.name: Helix Crown
records.summary: A biotech investment house funding designer organs, memory editing, and morally flexible research parks.

records.name: Afterimage News
records.summary: A scandal-hungry holo-media network that weaponizes leaks, citizen footage, and manipulated outrage.

records.name: Concrete Choir
records.summary: A tenant-defense movement with encrypted mesh networks, communal kitchens, and a talent for disappearing people from corp databases.

records.name: Velvet Hex
records.summary: An entertainment syndicate that manages idols, braindance stars, blackmail archives, and vice lounges.
